description: Mercantile accounts from the circle of Nahray b. Nissim. Headed אלחאפץ אללה והו אלמסלם, as in T-S NS 323.1 (PGPID 4275). The upper portion lists transactions involving garments, naming Abū Saʿīd Ibn Shaʿya and Barhūn. The lower portion preserved on T-S NS J188 lists recipients of a total sum of 5,000 dirhams, of which Zakariyyā and Ibrahīm (as one), Abū Yaḥya Nahray (b. Nissim), Abū l-Surūr, Abū Saʿīd […] each receive one thousand dirhams, while Yūsuf b. Faraḥ is apportioned 900 dirhams. Hebrew numerals are used. (Information in part from CUDL.) See also Goitein's attached transcription and compare T-S AS 157.482 (PGPID 38905). Join: Alan Elbaum.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
